2176590.name: Dreeg
2176590.description:
Dreeg is a dimension shifting platforming adventure game where you move between 3 parallel dimensions at will to solve puzzles and take on robotic enemies. Customize Dreeg's armor to gain power and unlock new abilities and upgrades for your energy weapon system. Enter a realm of wonder, strategic choices, and epic battles as you unlock the secrets of the multiverse.

Story


In the heart of a harmonious civilization, amidst a dimension suspended at the intersection of inter-dimensional energy, we find ourselves in a world beyond the confines of space and time. Here, our heroes, Dreeg and Mayana, rest in deep slumber, their energy pods symbols of the city's safety. The symbols of guardianship adorn every corner of this utopian city, a testament to the paramount role of Dreeg and Mayana as protectors. They remain in deep slumber, unaware of the world outside, their duty to safeguard a dimension outside of space and time.

But peril lurks in the form of Xel'xan, a brilliant scientist turned mad, whose obsession with the Nexus device threatens to shatter the fabric of existence. In a violent confrontation, Dreeg and Mayana are pulled into the unstable rift, leaving behind the city they swore to protect. The cataclysmic explosion of the Nexus device propels them to a harsh desert, where Mayana's life slips away, leaving Dreeg with a burden of grief and vengeance.

As Dreeg, embark on a quest to stop Xel'xan, destroy the Nexus device, and prevent the collapse of multiple dimensions. Explore parallel worlds, face off against formidable foes, and uncover the truth behind Xel'xan's descent into madness. The fate of the multiverse rests in your hands.

Key Features

  • Dimensional Mastery: Unleash the unparalleled ability to open portals to parallel dimensions at your command. Explore different worlds, solve puzzles, and outmaneuver enemies using your unique dimension-shifting powers.

  • Upgrade and Customize: Enhance your combat prowess with an array of armor and weapon upgrades. Discover equipment that not only boosts your defenses and offenses but also unlocks incredible abilities, giving you the upper hand against formidable foes.

  • Soundscapes of Adventure: Immerse yourself in an original soundtrack that sets the stage for your epic journey. The music of "Dreeg" enhances every moment, from tranquil exploration to heart-pounding battles.
"Dreeg" invites you to become a guardian of the multiverse, uncover the mysteries of the Nexus device, and wield the power of dimensions to save countless worlds. The portals await your command.
